name: Arris
description: Sevyas keeps saying a name — Arris. Adra found a gap in the patrol roster three days before the mission: a name removed, not crossed out. Talk to Sevyas about who Arris was.
accept_text: She spreads a roster on the table — a real paper one, ink and creases. 'Sevyas keeps saying that name. Arris. I looked through the intake records. Nobody named Arris came back with the patrol. Nobody named Arris is listed as killed in action.' She points to a gap, three names down from Sevyas. 'There's a space here. The name was removed. Not crossed out, not listed as transferred — removed. Three days before the patrol went out.' She slides the diary toward you. 'Ask him about Arris. Not about what happened. Just about who Arris was.'
complete_text: She sits when you come back. Just sits. 'He knows and he doesn't know. Both at the same time.' She straightens a blanket on an empty cot. 'That's the worst kind of knowing.'
